description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a prominent turret mounted centrally on its chassis. The vehicle features a long, forward-facing cannon as its primary weapon, with the turret and hull both exhibiting sharply sloped armor for increased deflection of projectiles. The sides of the vehicle are equipped with continuous tracks, providing enhanced mobility over rough terrain and urban obstacles. The exterior is finished in a solid, dark color, with no visible camouflage or military markings. The vehicle's design suggests a focus on survivability and firepower, with thick armor plating covering all major surfaces. No windows or external crew access points are visible, emphasizing its combat-oriented purpose.
description: A dark, angular combat vehicle with a central turret and long cannon, fully covered in sloped armor and running on continuous tracks. Its design is robust and imposing, built for urban and battlefield environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the vehicle, the long cannon, and the continuous tracks with sharply sloped armor.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow, angular profile, central turret, and the imposing barrel of the cannon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the tracks and turret structure.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view showing the back of the turret, the rear armor, and the end of the tracks.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sharply sloped armor plating on all sides, including turret and hull; no modular or reactive panels visible.
